item.title: mne-tools/mne-bids-pipeline

item.description: Luna software for sleep EEG analysis (base)

item.description: Autonomous research engine for generating, testing, and governing auditable claims across science, proofs, and high-stakes projects.

item.title: sklaff2a-gif/promethee-nexus
item.description: IA bio-inspirée auto-observée : 25+ organes (cardiaque, dopamine, préfrontal, Foie Cognitif, Pont Subconscient) qui ressentent le GPU, rêvent la nuit, et veto leurs propres projets face à la donnée. Boucle d'Inception P16↔LLM, observabilité

item.title: redmlovesyou333/arcgentica
item.description: 🤖 Solve ARC-AGI challenges efficiently using LLM-powered agentic AI for high accuracy and robust task performance.

item.title: verivital/nnv
item.description: Neural Network Verification Software Tool https://www.verivital.com Documentation:

item.title: ford442/brain_viz
item.description: Real-time 3D brain data visualization powered by EEG/tensors and WebGPU.

item.title: BasedHardware/omi
item.description: AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do

item.description: MNE: Magnetoencephalography (MEG) and Electroencephalography (EEG) in Python

item.description: Deep learning software to decode EEG, ECG or MEG signals

item.description: Mother of All BCI Benchmarks

item.title: fieldtrip/fieldtrip
item.description: The MATLAB toolbox for MEG, EEG and iEEG analysis

item.title: SpikeInterface/spikeinterface
item.description: A Python-based module for creating flexible and robust spike sorting pipelines.

item.description: Brainstorm software: MEG, EEG, fNIRS, ECoG, sEEG and electrophysiology

item.title: LorenFrankLab/spyglass
item.description: Neuroscience data analysis framework for reproducible research built by Loren Frank Lab at UCSF

item.title: sccn/liblsl
item.description: C++ lsl library for multi-modal time-synched data transmission over the local network

item.title: brainflow-dev/brainflow
item.description: BrainFlow is a library intended to obtain, parse and analyze EEG, EMG, ECG and other kinds of data from biosensors

item.title: tradecatlabs/human_infra
item.description: Human Infra: docs-as-code knowledge base for human runtime infrastructure, longevity evidence, future-waiting paths, disembodied CNS concepts, and memory-editing boundaries.

item.title: SpikeInterface/probeinterface
item.description: Python package to handle probe layout, geometry and wiring to device.

item.title: openlists/ElectrophysiologyData
item.description: A list of openly available datasets in (mostly human) electrophysiology.

item.description: GEDAI denoising plugin for EEG (EEGLAB, Brainstorm and Fieldtrip toolboxes)
